name: ESH Strategies Franchise LLC
validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.
Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: No cost data in Item 19 — cannot model unit economics from FDD
Territory criteria entirely at franchisor's discretion — no formula or guaranteed minimum
Materially different terms risk on transfer — transferee must accept then-current FA
No renewal right — franchise expires at end of 20-year term with no guaranteed continuation
22 company-owned hotels being sold to franchisees — terms and pricing unknown
Trademark license expires December 31, 2030 — only ~5 years into a 20-year franchise term
Digital Marketing Commission implementation status uncertain as of FDD issuance
System Services Fees pooled across all ESA Network brands — no proportionality obligation
Auditor emphasis on related party transactions — financial statements may not reflect arm's-length conditions

Exhibit D labeling inconsistency: signed-not-open section labeled as 'ESA Premier Suites Franchisees' rather than Select Suites, but Item 20 Table 5 identifies them as Select Suites projected openings
